data.name: Hero_Title
data.value: Rapid Own Source Revenue Analysis for Sustainable Cities

data.name: Featured_RosraTool_Desc
data.value: A UN-Habitat diagnostic tool for local governments to optimize own-source revenues.

data.name: Featured_WhatIsRosra_Desc
data.value: An evidence-based, quantitative decision-making tool for local finance practitioners in developing cities.

data.name: Featured_DataPrivacy_Desc
data.value: All data input into the ROSRA is completely confidential and only visible to the local government itself and UN-Habitat.

data.name: WhatIsRosra_Subtitle
data.value: ROSRA is a UN-Habitat diagnostic tool that helps local governments see where their own source revenue system stands today and how much room there is to improve.

data.name: WhatIsRosra_StrategicDecision_Desc
data.value: Clear visualization of OSR gaps for informed decisions and reform prioritization.

data.name: WhatIsRosra_RevenueOptimization_Desc
data.value: Estimates actual OSR gaps and shows how much revenue is being left untapped.

data.name: WhatIsRosra_ReformPrioritization_Desc
data.value: Prioritize interventions and allocate resources effectively.

data.name: WhatIsRosra_EnhancedCreditworthiness_Desc
data.value: Strengthen municipal finance foundations for sustainable growth.

data.name: WhatIsRosra_PoliticalSupport_Desc
data.value: Mobilize political support for revenue reforms with data-driven evidence.

data.name: OsrTypes_Subtitle
data.value: OSRs are taxes, fees, licenses, and other revenues directly controlled by local governments.

data.name: OsrTypes_PropertyTax_Desc
data.value: Recurrent tax on land or property

data.name: OsrTypes_OtherTaxes_Desc
data.value: Local Sales Tax, Excise Tax, Hotel Tax

data.name: WhyOptimize_OurFocus_Desc
data.value: UN-Habitat promotes transformative change in cities through knowledge, policy advice, technical assistance and collaborative action to leave no one and no place behind.

data.name: WhyOptimize_IncreasedResources_Desc
data.value: to close unfunded mandates and invest in development

data.name: WhyOptimize_GreaterAutonomy_Desc
data.value: and reduced dependence on inter-governmental transfers

data.name: WhyChoose_Data_Desc
data.value: We bring the best of global data paired with exemplary analysis to provide the most tailored recommendations.

data.name: WhyChoose_Experience_Desc
data.value: Global experience on municipal finance issues in many countries and contexts.

data.name: WhyChoose_Funds_Desc
data.value: When supported by a UN agency, it becomes easier to mobilize funding from other sources.

data.name: WhyChoose_Political_Desc
data.value: The UN name provides credibility and political stature to act on recommendations.

data.name: HowItWorks_Subtitle
data.value: The ROSRA analyses user data by comparing it with accepted benchmarks and the specific characteristics of well-functioning OSR systems observed in peer local governments.

data.name: HowItWorks_Step1_Desc
data.value: The authority and incentives of local government to raise OSR

data.name: HowItWorks_Step2_Desc
data.value: The capacity and incentives of the revenue administration

data.name: HowItWorks_Step3_Desc
data.value: The strategy, management and collection processes

data.name: HowItWorks_Step4_Desc
data.value: Detailed breakdown of revenue gaps and potential estimates

data.name: HowItWorks_Step5_Desc
data.value: Comprehensive report with recommendations in ~1 hour

data.name: Sdg_HoverNote
data.value: Hover over an icon to learn more.
